protein_name: Laminin alpha-5 receptor. May mediate intracellular signaling. Wide tissue distribution (highest in the pancreas and very low in brain). Closely associated with the basal layer of cells in epithelia and the endothelium of blood vessel walls. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
